name: newsletter-curator-story-feed
description: Read-only MCP plugin for inspecting stored Newsletter Curator stories.

interface.shortDescription: Read stored newsletter stories through MCP
interface.longDescription: Expose the Newsletter Curator SQLite repository as a read-only MCP tool so Codex can inspect recent stored stories without triggering new retrieval or summarization.
defaultPrompt: List the latest stored newsletter stories from this repo
Show only Gmail stories from the recent story feed
Check the last hour of repository stories
